positive_prompt: A photorealistic image-to-video animation from the provided image, 97 frames, 30 fps, about 3.2 seconds. Start exactly from the provided frame: a beige speckled ceramic handled bowl filled with cold creamy soup on a rustic wooden table, topped with radish slices, diced vegetables, herbs and pink cubes, with bread on a board, radishes, a beige drink bottle, fresh herbs, a checkered cloth and a spoon around it. Preserve the original aspect ratio, composition, objects and background. The bowl is already served and still; it is not being poured, stirred or eaten. During the clip, the soup surface makes one very gentle settling ripple as if the bowl was just placed down, the floating radish slices and small ingredients drift only a few millimeters, then become calm and stable by the final frames. Use very subtle cinematic camera movement: a slow stable minimal drift with gentle parallax, keeping the bowl centered and all key table elements visible. Add only subtle visible motion: soft highlights shimmer on the creamy liquid and spoon, tiny reflections shift on the ceramic rim. Photorealistic, natural lighting, realistic colors, realistic physics, smooth temporal consistency, stable object shapes, calm cinematic motion.
negative_prompt: No spoon entering the bowl, no hand, no stirring, no pouring, no eating, no boiling, no steam, no splashing, no ingredients flying out, no garnish transforming, no soup changing color, no bowl sliding away, crop, cropped frame, stretched image, squeezed image, aspect ratio change, missing important objects, changed composition, fast zoom, dramatic zoom, aggressive orbit, 360 orbit, shaky camera, unstable horizon, jump cut, flicker, blurry motion, motion blur artifacts, uncontrolled motion, random changes, melting objects, duplicated objects, disappearing objects, inconsistent object shape, changed background, unrealistic physics, rushed action, sudden movement, incomplete action, endless motion, no final state, cartoon style, CGI look, text artifacts, logo distortion.
